title: Share a Cluster with Namespaces — Creating a new namespace
text:
Create a new YAML file called
my-namespace.yaml
with the contents:
apiVersion
:
v1
kind
:
Namespace
metadata
:
name
:
<insert-namespace-name-here>
Then run:
kubectl create -f ./my-namespace.yaml
Alternatively, you can create namespace using below command:
kubectl create namespace <insert-namespace-name-here>
The name of your namespace must be a valid
DNS label
.
There's an optional field
finalizers
, which allows observables to purge resources whenever the
namespace is deleted. Keep in mind that if you specify a nonexistent finalizer, the namespace will
be created but will get stuck in the
Terminating
state if the user tries to delete it.
More information on
finalizers
can be found in the namespace
design doc
.
